name: Melon Pernod and Strawberry Yogurt Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons finely chopped strawberries, in juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the honeydew and cantaloupe, then cut into bite-sized cubes or balls.
2. Place the fruit pieces in a glass bowl.
3. Drizzle the anise flavored liqueur over the fruit, stirring to coat evenly.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 30 to 60 minutes, stirring several times.
5. Add the yogurt mixture to the fruit and stir until well blended.
6. Place the yogurt dip in a small bowl; center it on a dish or shallow bowl and surround with melon balls.
TIP: Pour (1/4 teaspoon or more) anise extract onto a piece of rind, then seal it with the melon balls. Cover and let the melon absorb some of the flavor without any alcohol.
